name: Royal Beef Bourguignon
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Top round steak, cut into 2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the steak in butter in a heavy Dutch oven.
2. Combine flour and sherry, stirring until well blended; stir into the Dutch oven.
3. Cook bacon until crisp; drain, reserving drippings. Crumble the bacon and add to the steak.
4. Sauté onions in bacon drippings until tender; remove with a slotted spoon and add to the steak.
5. Sauté mushrooms in remaining bacon drippings; drain well and set aside.
6. Add the remaining ingredients, except mushrooms, to the steak; cover and simmer over low heat for 1-1/2 hours.
7. Add mushrooms; cover and simmer an additional 30 minutes.
